attributes.description: Alerts when 5xx rate on a specific Traefik router exceeds threshold. Localises failures to a routing rule.
attributes.name: [Traefik OTel] High 5xx error rate by router

investigation_guide.blob:
## Traefik high 5xx error rate by router

### What fired
Per-router 5xx rate exceeded threshold (min 50 total requests).

### Why it matters
Router-level analysis isolates failures to specific host / path rules. Usually points at a misbehaving upstream service.

### Triage
1. Check the matched service.

### Remediation
- Fix the upstream.

### Tuning
- Tune threshold per router criticality.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
// Limit to router-level request counters (counter requires TS + INCREASE)
| WHERE traefik_router_requests_total IS NOT NULL
// Aggregate total and 5xx requests per router over the time window
| STATS
    total = SUM(traefik_router_requests_total),
    errors_5xx = SUM(traefik_router_requests_total) WHERE attributes.code LIKE "5*"
  BY attributes.router
// Minimum sample size; adjust based on expected traffic per router
| WHERE total > 50
| EVAL error_rate_pct = ROUND(errors_5xx / total * 100.0, 2)
// Alert threshold: tune for sensitivity
| WHERE error_rate_pct > 5.0
| SORT error_rate_pct DESC
| LIMIT 10
